assemblykor 0.1.1

Package index

Package

assemblykor assemblykor-package
assemblykor: Korean National Assembly Data for Political Science Education

Datasets

Seven built-in datasets covering legislators, bills, asset declarations, policy seminars, committee speeches, plenary votes, and individual roll call records.

legislators
Members of the Korean National Assembly (20th-22nd)
bills
Bills Proposed in the Korean National Assembly (20th-22nd)
wealth
Legislator Asset Declarations (2015-2025)
seminars
Policy Seminar Activity by Legislator-Year (2000-2025)
speeches
Committee Speeches from the Science and ICT Committee (22nd Assembly)
votes
Plenary Vote Results in the Korean National Assembly (20th-22nd)
roll_calls
Member-Level Roll Call Votes (22nd Assembly)

Download Functions

Download larger datasets not included in the package binary. Results are cached locally after the first download.

get_bill_texts()
Download bill propose-reason texts
get_proposers()
Download bill co-sponsorship records

Tutorials

Nine Korean-language tutorials for classroom use, available in both interactive (learnr) and plain R Markdown formats.

list_tutorials()
List available tutorials
open_tutorial()
Open a tutorial file
run_tutorial()
Run an interactive tutorial

Utilities

path_to_file()
Path to assemblykor CSV files
set_ko_font()
Set Korean font for ggplot2

On this page

Developed by Kyusik Yang.
